ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "design" TEXT /* Experimental design used (e.g., paired CS, distractor) */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question being addressed */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher responsible for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "ethical_approval" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the experiment has ethical approval */,
  "data_access_policy" TEXT /* Description of the data access policy for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "subject_nr" INTEGER /* Subject number of the participant */,
  "pre_post" TEXT /* Whether the participant is part of the pre or post condition */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the participant has signed a consent form */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant enrolled in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_conditions" (
  "learning_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning condition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the learning condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the learning condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the learning condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the learning condition was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the learning condition */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the learning condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("learning_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_conditions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_conditions" (
  "memory_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory condition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the memory condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the memory condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the memory condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the memory condition was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the memory condition */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the memory condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memory_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_conditions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial is part of */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the trial is part of */,
  "trial_nr" INTEGER /* Trial number */,
  "cs_filename" TEXT /* Filename of the conditioned stimulus */,
  "us_valence" TEXT /* Valence of the unconditioned stimulus */,
  "cs_dur_level" TEXT /* Duration level of the conditioned stimulus */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., paired CS, distractor, neither) */,
  "learning_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learning condition associated with the trial */,
  "memory_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory condition associated with the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_memory_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("memory_condition_id") REFERENCES memory_conditions ("memory_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_learning_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("learning_condition_id") REFERENCES learning_conditions ("learning_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being evaluated */,
  "eval_rating" INTEGER /* Evaluation rating given by the participant */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_ratings" (
  "time_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time rating */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being rated */,
  "time_rating_form" INTEGER /* Time rating given by the participant for the form */,
  "time_rating_blank" INTEGER /* Time rating given by the participant for the blank */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time rating was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_ratings_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
